description: Style NoteEvery girl needs a choice of kurtas in her off-duty wardrobe. aurelia have been inspired by the street fads that are currently trending and have added this style to their latest collection. For the conservative at heart, this piece can be worn with leggings and delicate sandals. For a boho chick meets rebel style, colour block this with bright capris.Product DetailsPrinted orange sleeveless kurta that has a round neck, buttoned chest placket, yoke with pin tucks on either sides of the placket and a vented hemMaterial and Care100% cottonWash in cold water with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleachDry inside out in shadeWarm iron do not iron on decorationsSize and FitRegular fitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
